{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The novelty claim is too broad and omits relevant prior work.",
    "R1.7": "The citation and scholarship are mostly correct, but the paper could benefit from more precise citations and a clearer discussion of related literature.",
    "RX.1": "I am uncertain about the sign and threshold structure of ∂k*/∂p (stated as Proposition 1) — I am confident the monotonicity claim in your original is at minimum incomplete, but the exact form of the non-monotonicity depends on the relaxation and the budget regime.",
    "RX.3": "The scope adherence is mostly within the agreed J*(d), with some minor drifts in the discussion of related literature.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim about Chen et al. 2024 is unverified and may be incorrect).",
    "RX.5": "The provenance and traceability are mostly correct, with some minor issues in the discussion of related literature."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.2,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The novelty claim is too broad and omits relevant prior work.
rationale.R1.7: The citation and scholarship are mostly correct, but the paper could benefit from more precise citations and a clearer discussion of related literature.
rationale.RX.1: I am uncertain about the sign and threshold structure of ∂k*/∂p (stated as Proposition 1) — I am confident the monotonicity claim in your original is at minimum incomplete, but the exact form of the non-monotonicity depends on the relaxation and the budget regime.
rationale.RX.3: The scope adherence is mostly within the agreed J*(d), with some minor drifts in the discussion of related literature.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim about Chen et al. 2024 is unverified and may be incorrect).
rationale.RX.5: The provenance and traceability are mostly correct, with some minor issues in the discussion of related literature.
